figures.caption: Figure 4: Qualitative results of the ambiguity mitigation by UAVs control in maritime scenarios using AirSim (Shah et al. 2017) with Unreal Engine (Epic Games). Green text indicates ’High object locational probability’ detections, while red text indicates ’Low object locational probability’ detections, accompanied by localization scores.
Figure 5: Average reward results of the proposed ERPPO and MAPPO in retraining procedure.

Figure 1: False object detection results generated by (a) YoloOW (Xu et al. 2024) and (b) YoloWorld (Cheng et al. 2024). (c) shows the true case and movement by MAPPO (Yu et al. 2022). Even though applying MAPPO, (d) represents the false case.
Figure 2: Overview of the proposed framework with distributional spatiotemporal ambiguity (DSA) learner and entropy regularization-based proximal policy optimization (ERPPO).
Figure 3: Performance comparison of ERPPO with MAPPO, MASAC, DDQN, and QMIX in partially observable maritime dynamic environment
